tests.name: framework_self_guard_active

documentation_gaps.gap: process-checklist.sh --help omits --start-phase1, --start-phase3, --start-phase4 (only --start-feature, --start-uat documented). All three accept these flags, but discoverability is poor.

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: RC=0; phase1_architecture key initialized in process-state.json

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: .phase1_architecture.steps_completed is array

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 steps completed sequentially: architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: scripts/check-phase-gate.sh exits 0 ('Phase gates consistent')

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D confirmation: no script writes to current_phase. Manually had to set .current_phase=2 to continue downstream tests.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: Run --start-phase1 + complete all 5 phase1_architecture steps + check-phase-gate.sh (passes). Inspect .claude/phase-state.json — .current_phase is still 0.
framework_bugs.expected: After Phase 1 gate passes (and approval logged), some script should advance .current_phase from 1 to 2.
framework_bugs.actual: No script in scripts/ writes .current_phase. grep -n 'current_phase' shows only reads. Confirms still-open prior-sweep bug U-D.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: .build_loop.feature='uat-feat-1' after --start-feature

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 6 steps including feature_recorded completed sequentially with stub artifacts (src/feat1.swift, tests/feat1.test.swift, docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md)

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after all 5 prior steps complete; project pre-commit hook passed (TDD ordering warning only)

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded with RC=0. PreToolUse hook is bypassed because shell-direct git does not invoke Claude's pre-commit-gate.sh path. Confirmed via simulated PreToolUse: piping {tool_input: {command: 'git commit ...'}} to scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh DOES return permissionDecision=deny — so hook works in-Claude, just not for shell-direct git.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, the build_loop auto-resets to feature=null. After starting a new feature uat-feat-2-grace and completing all 5 prior steps, --check-commit-message 'feat(grace): grace test' returns RC=0 (allowed). PR #17 grace-window fix verified.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote sentinel via scripts/pending-approval.sh --offer/--options/--recommendation. Simulated PreToolUse: pre-commit-gate.sh returned permissionDecision=deny with the pending-approval reason. PR #16 BL-015 sentinel reader verified.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocation no longer denies on pending-approval (other gates still active e.g. phase2_init verification).

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .features_completed contains 'uat-feat-1' in .claude/build-progress.json

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006
framework_bugs.reproduction: git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' from project root with no active build_loop
framework_bugs.expected: Either pre-commit hook installed in .git/hooks/pre-commit (or commit-msg hook) blocks the commit, or the project documents that BL-006 is enforced only inside Claude's PreToolUse hook flow.
framework_bugs.actual: Direct git commit succeeds with RC=0. The pre-commit gate works only when invoked via Claude's PreToolUse path; no commit-msg hook is installed by init.sh. This is the still-open prior-sweep bug U-C.

documentation_gaps.gap: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh prints 'Usage: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh <populated-html-file>' when called without arguments. The runbook expects this to work against the generated UAT scenario template, but no template path is auto-detected. Either the script should default to docs/uat-scenarios/*.html or the runbook should specify the file argument.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: scripts/process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 RC=0 (with warnings on bug gate)

tests.name: start_uat_creates_session
tests.details: .uat_session.started_at is non-null

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: Linter requires a file argument; no UAT scenario template was generated for the project at docs/uat-scenarios/. Mark as N/A: linter cannot be exercised against an auto-generated artifact for this config (light track, mobile).

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS completed: agents_dispatched, template_generated, orchestrator_notified, results_received, completeness_verified, bugs_consolidated, triage_complete, remediation_complete, gate_passed

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: scripts/check-phase-gate.sh exits 0 (consistency check passes overall though numerous warnings about HANDOFF.md, INCIDENT_RESPONSE.md, sbom.json, SECURITY.md not yet present — these surface as warnings rather than blockers under default mode)

documentation_gaps.gap: No UAT scenario HTML template auto-generated under docs/uat-scenarios/ at init time, so the lint helper cannot be exercised. The runbook (Section D) implies a template exists.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: scripts/process-checklist.sh --start-phase4 RC=0

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: All 6 PHASE4_STEPS completed: production_build, rollback_tested, go_live_verified, monitoring_configured, handoff_written, handoff_tested. Stub artifacts created: docs/test-results/*rollback-test.md, *handoff-test.md, HANDOFF.md, RELEASE_NOTES.md (latter pre-populated by init.sh).

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: phase4_release:monitoring_configured returned RC=1 with [FAIL] artifact check before HANDOFF.md was created; gate then passed RC=0 once HANDOFF.md was stubbed with monitoring section.

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: RELEASE_NOTES.md was already present (init.sh generated it at project setup), so go_live_verified passed without explicit creation. The artifact check exists in code (line ~344 of process-checklist.sh) and would block a missing RELEASE_NOTES.md.

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: All 6 phase4_release steps in steps_completed array. .current_phase=4. (.current_phase had to be manually set to 4 prior — see U-D bug for phase 1 — same root cause.)

documentation_gaps.gap: RELEASE_NOTES.md is auto-stubbed by init.sh, which means the phase4_release:go_live_verified artifact gate cannot be exercised in a fresh-init UAT — the assertion always passes vacuously. Consider not pre-stubbing RELEASE_NOTES.md so the gate has real bite.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep matches in committed files were all template/doc references (e.g., 'GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}' in ci.yml, '# Secrets (belt and suspenders with gitleaks)' in .gitignore). No leaked credentials.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: .claude/process-audit.log does not exist (no FORCE/reset events occurred during the run). N/A per runbook clause.

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find .claude -name '*.tmp' returned no matches

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged from setup). git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only pre-existing untracked dirs (.claude/, Reports/uat-2026-04-26/) — none modified by this agent's run.

summary: Base personal/mobile/light config completed all 5 sections with PR #16/#17/#18/#19 fixes verified (BL-015 sentinel deny, BL-006 grace window reset, U-H helpers copied, framework-self guard, --non-interactive init). Two Medium prior-sweep bugs re-confirmed (U-C direct-shell BL-006 bypass, U-D no current_phase auto-advance); no new critical/high regressions surfaced.
